refine_constraint: You must obtain information by calling tools and ensure the solution involves at least 2 tool calls to retrieve the average altitudes of both mountain ranges. The total number of interaction turns (tool calls) must not exceed 4 in your solution process. If the agent chooses to invoke the altitude_tool for both mountain ranges, the calls must be executed in a single parallel action step. The altitude_tool must be invoked no more than 2 times across the entire solution.
constraint: Must invoke altitude_tool for "Rocky Mountains" and "Alps" in a single action step to retrieve their average altitudes concurrently
